notes: From a separate 'Offensive cyber evaluations' chart on the same announcement page that explicitly plots a 'Claude Fable' series (distinct from Opus 4.8, Mythos Preview, and Mythos 5) at 0.0% on CyberGym as well as on Firefox/OSS-Fuzz/CyScenarioBench. CyberGym score for GPT-5.6 Sol, from BenchLM's CyberGym leaderboard ('GPT-5.6 Sol leads the public snapshot at 84.5%', rank #1). This is a third-party independent leaderboard run, not an OpenAI self-reported figure (OpenAI's own launch materials report a different internal 'capture-the-flag suite' score of 96.7% and cite an external firm called Irregular for cyber capability evals, neither of which is the CyberGym benchmark itself). One other secondary mention of 83.6% for the same pairing surfaced in a noisy web-search synopsis but without a clean citation, so treating 84.5% (the leaderboard's own stated number) as authoritative.
